title: Decoding strategies + speculative decoding + JSON mode + DSA Greedy

items.label: Greedy, beam, top-k, top-p, temperature
interviewQuestions: Compare greedy, beam, top-k, and nucleus (top-p) decoding.
Why is beam search usually a bad choice for open-ended generation?
What does temperature actually do to the softmax distribution?

items.label: Speculative decoding & draft models
interviewQuestions: How does speculative decoding speed up inference without hurting quality?
Why doesn't speculative decoding always help — what's the relationship between draft acceptance rate and speedup?

items.label: Constrained / structured decoding (JSON mode, grammars)
interviewQuestions: How would you force an LLM to emit valid JSON — and what are the failure modes?
Compare grammar-constrained decoding vs prompt-+-retry-+-validate — when does each fit?

items.label: Implement a generate() loop for a tiny GPT
interviewQuestions: Implement top-k and nucleus sampling inside an autoregressive generate() loop.
How do temperature, top-k, and top-p interact when a model becomes repetitive or incoherent?
What stopping conditions do you need for a chat model beyond max_new_tokens?
